CustomField.formula: "E-" & leaseworks__Serial_Number__c & IF( ISBLANK( TEXT( leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c ) ), "", TRIM( IF( CONTAINS( TEXT( leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c ), "-" ), LEFT( TEXT( leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c ), FIND( "-", TEXT( leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c ) ) - 1 ), TEXT( leaseworks__Engine_Type_GP__c ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Sun Analysis Code
